---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe:
<!-- e.g. I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

Any alternative approaches or features you've considered.

## Impact

Does this affect the AI agent, a data tool, the frontend UI, or the API?

- [ ] Agent / LLM orchestration
- [ ] Data tool (market, news, filings)
- [ ] Frontend UI / component
- [ ] API / backend route
- [ ] Auth / tenant isolation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / deployment

## Additional Context

Add any context, screenshots, or diagrams.
